instruction: Delete the entire right‑foreground marble statue of a child holding grapes—including head, torso, draped cloth, both bunches of grapes, hands, and any small protrusions. Remove all lighting effects it creates: erase its sharp, complete silhouette shadow on the flat wall to the left and any shadowing on the base/floor and tight contact shadow at the feet. Reconstruct the background where the statue and its shadow were with a clean, uniformly sunlit wall and baseboard that continue the existing smooth surface, warm color, and vertical panel seams, consistent with a single directional light coming from the right. Leave the surrounding area empty, keep the rest of the scene unchanged, and do not introduce new objects or lights.

prompts.superficial: Remove the statue of the child holding grapes.
prompts.intermediate: Remove the statue and also remove any shadows and light interactions it produces, consistent with a scene lit by one strong directional light that casts sharp shadows onto a flat wall and floor. Maintain the lighting direction and leave the nearby space empty.
prompts.explicit: Delete the entire right‑foreground marble statue of a child holding grapes—including head, torso, draped cloth, both bunches of grapes, hands, and any small protrusions. Remove all lighting effects it creates: erase its sharp, complete silhouette shadow on the flat wall to the left and any shadowing on the base/floor and tight contact shadow at the feet. Reconstruct the background where the statue and its shadow were with a clean, uniformly sunlit wall and baseboard that continue the existing smooth surface, warm color, and vertical panel seams, consistent with a single directional light coming from the right. Leave the surrounding area empty, keep the rest of the scene unchanged, and do not introduce new objects or lights.

annotated_qa_pairs.question: Is there a shadow shaped like a child?
Is there a contact shadow at the baseboard?
Is the scene lit by a single directional light from the right?
Are the vertical panel seams on the wall continuous?
